notes.si_units: Many variables have both conventional and SI (International System) unit measurements. SI unit variables typically end with 'SI' in their code.
notes.lc_method: Variables with 'LC' in the name indicate measurements using liquid chromatography or liquid chromatography-mass spectrometry (LC-MS/MS) methods.
notes.categorical_coding: Categorical variables typically use numeric codes (e.g., 1=Yes, 2=No, 7=Refused, 9=Don't know). Refer to NHANES codebooks for specific value mappings.
notes.missing_values: Missing values and special codes (refused, don't know) are typically represented by specific numeric codes in the actual data.
notes.data_quality: Some measurements may have quality flags or comments. Check NHANES documentation for data quality indicators.
notes.confidentiality: Some geographic and detailed demographic variables may be suppressed or top-coded to protect participant confidentiality.
